story.title: Skybound
story.logline: As a former pilot now navigating a treacherous flight, Sam must confront his troubled past and trust his instincts to save the lives of everyone on board.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: Meet Sam, a former pilot struggling to come to terms with his past mistakes. He boards a plane with his friend Leo, unaware of the challenges ahead.

acts.label: Inciting Incident
acts.description: As the plane hits turbulence, Sam's past and present collide, threatening to destroy the lives of everyone on board.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: With the plane on the verge of disaster, Sam must confront his demons and trust his instincts to save the day.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: As the plane lands safely, Sam must come to terms with the consequences of his actions and find a way to redeem himself.

story.world: A former pilot, now haunted by his past mistakes, must confront his demons and trust his instincts to save the lives of everyone on board a commercial airliner.
